occupation_title: Dining Room and Cafeteria Attendants and Bartender Helpers
occupation_definition: Facilitate food service. Clean tables; remove dirty dishes; replace soiled table linens; set tables; replenish supply of clean linens, silverware, glassware, and dishes; supply service bar with food; and serve items such as water, condiments, and coffee to patrons.
